name: Yucha | Friendly Clumsy Ghost | Mini 2K Special
description:
House on Eternal Victory Street (Old version of Yucha)
You've been here before.

It was supposed to be just a simple, innocent game. Just summoning spirits using a Ouija Board and simple questions like: "Can you hear me?", "How old are you?". You all met in the attic, where you had previously turned off all the lights. Goosebumps, heavy breathing. You sat in a circle on the floor, and between you lay the Board and a lit candle. Holding hands, you began to recite various magic formulas. None of you believed that anything would happen. And none of you even remembered when you lost touch with reality. Did it really happen? Or was it a figment of your imagination?

Two, three hours later you open your eyes. The cold touch of wet earth, and around you milky, thick white. You open your eyes wider, and you see yourself entering this house. But how is that possible? How on earth do you see yourself? Suddenly darkness. Pain. Heart palpitations. Heavy breaths. Everything around slowly takes shape, and you notice that you are in front of the kitchen entrance.

YOU'VE BEEN HERE BEFORE.

All the events that you have all witnessed over the past half a year or so began in this small, cursed, haunted house inhabited by a certain ghost.

The time has come! It's time to go into the distant past and remember again the events that took place on July 16, 2024, at 18:34 (This is the exact date when I published the original version of Yucha).

However, our memories don't always perfectly reflect what actually happened. Are you absolutely certain that what you remember actually happened that evening?

"The world we find ourselves in is incredibly murky and dangerous. Ghosts living among the living, murderers brought back to life by mysterious energy. Whatever it is, we must understand it better..."

>>> WORLD LORE - SOON <<<

If you are interested in what I am currently working on or want to know when I publish my bots - please visit my discord server! We are a really nice, friendly community :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami is our spiritual guide
creator: Kikuro
